name: French Style Vegetable Stew
recipeIngredient: 1 medium green pepper, cut into thin strips
1/2 cup olive oil or salad oil
1 medium eggplant, pared and cut into strips
4 medium tomatoes, peeled and cut into eighths
recipeInstructions:
1. In a Dutch oven, sauté the chopped onions until transparent.
2. Add garlic and cook for an additional minute.
3. Add zucchini and green pepper; cook until vegetables are tender.
4. Coat eggplant with flour, then add it to the pot along with tomatoes.
5. Combine ketchup and remaining ingredients in a bowl.
6. Pour the sauce mixture over the vegetables.
7. Cover and simmer for 30-35 minutes, stirring occasionally.
8. Makes 8-10 servings (about 7 cups).
